user_message: Give me the manager view on this Nod Publishers exec meeting notes. This is time-sensitive -- customer is waiting.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-04 08:40 EST
Subject: Follow-up: consumption trend Review

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with consumption trend. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
Date: 2024-02-23 14:41 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Nod Publishers consumption trend

Just checking in on the consumption trend proposal. Our VP Engineering is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-05 10:05 EST
Subject: Re: consumption trend Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the consumption trend proposal. Our VP Engineering is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Nod Publishers: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

handoffs.condition: MSX records need dark-period hygiene catchup

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Dark-Customer Re-Emergence template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
